title: Space$hip
lyrics:
[Chorus: BPace]
Hit the booty club for the day shift
Niggas talk a lot but they don't say shit
Lost a lot of love you can't replace
I can't see you too much money in the way
Fly out to Japan on occasions
Butterfly my doors it's a space ship
Invest into myself cuz I ain't waiting
Gotta thank the lord I ain't basic

[Verse 1: BPace]
Rolling up my problems in a backwood
Leave a boujie bih for tryna act up
My Partna jabbawockeez they stay masked up
If you hating on me you needa get ya cash up
Feeling good, feeling right, feeling right
Feeling good, feeling right, feeling right
Been on my grind forever, dedication
Long nights, blood sweat and tears off in that basement
Baby I'm too focused give me head ain't tryna date ya
Ain't no hard feelings I'm too focused on this paper
Run it up, feeling good, bish my money up
Keep it, tucked
Dooley truck
I can't wife no slut, I can't wife no slut

[Chorus: BPace & ¥ellow Bucks]
Hit the booty club for the day shift
Niggas talk a lot but thеy don't say shit
Lost a lot of love you can't replace
I can't see you too much monеy in the way
Fly out to Japan on occasions
Butterfly my doors it's a space ship
Invest into myself cuz I ain't waiting
Gotta thank the lord I ain't basic
Feeling good, feeling right, feeling right
Feeling good (feeling good), feeling right (feeling right), feeling right (Yeah, yeah)

[Verse 2: ¥ellow Bucks]
乗り込む船 操縦士オレ
同乗するなら愛をくれ
乗り込む船 乗れんものはねえ
We're over basic 黄色のSpaceship
See you later 地元に一礼
まだ登り詰めるこのTripにはキリがねえが
Feeling good, feeling right
この島国で叫ぶ I'm gonna get high

[Chorus: BPace]
Hit the booty club for the day shift
Niggas talk a lot but they don't say shit
Lost a lot of love you can't replace
I can't see you too much money in the way
Fly out to Japan on occasions
Butterfly my doors it's a space ship
Invest into myself cuz I ain't waiting
Gotta thank the lord I ain't basic
Feeling good, feeling right, feeling right
Feeling good, feeling right, feeling right
